title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 02 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 02 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 02 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.07% today, the main contract closed at 831. The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are not active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is less.PBF at Shandong port deal 867 yuan/mt,decrease 8 yuan/mt.
